fault_hypothesis: The expiry check at line 77 uses a strict greater-than comparison (`>`), causing entries to be considered valid when the current time is exactly equal to the expiration time. It should use greater-than-or-equal-to (`>=`) to correctly handle the boundary case.

constraints.intent: An entry at the exact expiry boundary should be treated as expired.
If an entry is served, the current time must be strictly before its expiration.
The expiration timestamp from a validated entry must be non-negative.
